greetings.hi: Hello! How can I help you today?
greetings.hello: Hi there! Ask me anything about Soul AI.
greetings.hi, how are you?: I'm doing great, thanks for asking! How can I assist you today?

faqs.what is soul ai: Soul AI is a demo conversational assistant used for the XBotAI exercise.
faqs.who made you: I was created as part of a frontend coding task.
faqs.what are restful apis: RESTful APIs are designed around the REST (Representational State Transfer) architecture, which uses HTTP requests to access and manipulate data. They follow a stateless, client-server, cacheable communications protocol.
